title: Rustins Quick Dry Outdoor Wood Stain Satin Medium Oak 1ltr- Durable and Weather-Resistant Finish, Fast Drying, Vibrant Color for Decks, Fences, & Furniture, Available in Many Wood Shades
features: Superior Weather Resistance: Rustins Quick Dry Outdoor Wood Stain offers exceptional protection against harsh weather conditions, ensuring your exterior wood surfaces stay beautiful and durable throughout the year

Fast Drying Formula: Our advanced quick-dry technology allows for a rapid drying time, letting you complete your outdoor staining projects faster and with less hassle, so you can enjoy your outdoor spaces sooner
Enhanced UV Protection: This premium wood stain includes enhanced UV protection to prevent fading and discoloration, keeping your wood surfaces looking vibrant and fresh for longer. ADD TO BASKET now
Easy Application: Designed for effortless application, Rustins Quick Dry Outdoor Wood Stain can be applied smoothly with a brush or roller, providing a streak-free, even finish every time.

Long-Lasting Durability: Our high-performance wood stain offers long-lasting durability, resisting cracking, peeling, and blistering, so your wood surfaces maintain their integrity and aesthetic appeal over time
description: From the manufacturer Feature In 1924 Sidney Rustin opened his shop in London's Shoreditch district where he wood finishing products to local residents and trades people. Sidney's father was a cabinetmaker and his mother funded the business venture. During the second world war the first night raid destroyed 1932 factory and the business moved to its present location in Cricklewood, London. Ronnie Rustin, Sidney's son, took over the business and ran it until his death in 2008. He drove the growth of Rustins to be one of the best brands in the industry with a focus on wood finishing products, speciality paints and decorating sundries. About Us Today, Rustins continues its research and development efforts on its markets of wood finishing, speciality paint and decorating. We continually bring to market product giving with advances in aware products, more good finishes and a good range of products to meet our growing international customers' wants.
